title: ReloadCmd in podman quadlet not working
body:
### Issue Description

`ReloadCmd=` in the `[Container]` section of my .container quadlet file is not working.

`quadlet-generator[443386]: converting "caddy.container": unsupported key 'ReloadCmd' in group 'Container' in /home/user/.config/containers/systemd/caddy.container`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create .container file with ReloadCmd inside the [[Container] section](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#container-units-container:~:text=ReloadCmd%3D%2Fusr%2Fbin%2Fcommand). 
2. Run `systemctl --user daemon-reload`.


### Describe the results you received

systemd-generator fails because of unsupported key.

### Describe the results you expected

`ReloadCmd` should create an `ExecReload` in the .service file.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

comments.body: This is just an issue with the version. ReloadCmd was introduced in a later version.
